understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating through the level, avoiding spikes, and using clicks to remove breakable blocks to open paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal with MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT. After a horizontal move, gravity (which was DOWN in this level) pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK actions remove breakable tiles ('x') at target positions without moving the player or advancing turn-based hazards like the rising platform. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause instant failure. UNDO reverts the last action. The player had limited turns per attempt and multiple attempts per level.
